name: Berry Breakfast Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk eggs with flour.
2. Gradually whisk in milk, then granulated sugar and vanilla.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch (20 cm) skillet.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until puffed and golden.
5. Dust with icing sugar.
6. Mound berries in the center of each puff pastry.
7. Serve immediately with plain yogurt or whipped cream.
8. Makes 2 servings.
